scripts.test:e2e: node ./tests/scripts/ensure-clean-ports.js && start-server-and-test "npm --prefix backend start" http://localhost:5000/health "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host" http://localhost:5173 "node ./tests/e2e/selenium.test.js"
scripts.test:load: node ./tests/scripts/ensure-clean-ports.js && start-server-and-test "npm --prefix backend start" http://localhost:5000/health "k6 run --summary-export=k6-summary.json -e BASE_URL=http://localhost:5000 ./tests/load/k6-smoke.js"
scripts.test:load:cloud: node ./tests/scripts/ensure-clean-ports.js && start-server-and-test "npm --prefix backend start" http://localhost:5000/health "k6 run -o cloud --summary-export=k6-summary.json -e BASE_URL=http://localhost:5000 ./tests/load/k6-smoke.js"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:load
